properties.serializedData:
{"version": "Notebook/1.0", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "# SpyCloud Investigations Dashboard
**Investigation Tracking** - Monitor active investigations, case progress, and investigation outcomes from SpyCloud Investigations data.

> This workbook focuses exclusively on SpyCloudInvestigations_CL data for tracking investigation workflows and results.

---"}, "name": "title"}, {"type": 9, "content": {"version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "parameters": [{"id": "inv_time_range", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "TimeRange", "type": 4, "isRequired": true, "value": {"durationMs": 2592000000}, "typeSettings": {"selectableValues": [{"durationMs": 86400000}, {"durationMs": 604800000}, {"durationMs": 2592000000}, {"durationMs": 7776000000}], "allowCustom": true}, "label": "Time Range"}, {"id": "inv_sev_filter", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "SeverityFilter", "type": 2, "isRequired": false, "multiSelect": true, "quote": "", "delimiter": ",", "query": "SpyCloudInvestigations_CL | distinct severity | order by severity desc", "typeSettings": {"additionalResourceOptions": ["value::all"]}, "defaultValue": "value::all", "label": "Severity"}]}, "name": "parameters"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Label:string, Value:long, Order:int)["Total Investigations", 0, 1, "Active Cases", 0, 2, "Unique Subjects", 0, 3, "High Severity", 0, 4]),
(SpyCloudInvestigations_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Total Investigations", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudInvestigations_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where status == "active" | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Active Cases", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudInvestigations_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(subject) | extend Label="Unique Subjects", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudInvestigations_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where severity >= 20 | summarize v=count() | extend Label="High Severity", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc", "size": 4, "title": "Investigation Summary", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "tiles", "tileSettings": {"titleContent": {"columnMatch": "Label", "formatter": 1}, "leftContent": {"columnMatch": "Value", "formatter": 12, "formatOptions": {"palette": "auto"}}}}, "name": "investigationTiles"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudInvestigations_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize NewInvestigations=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc)", "size": 0, "title": "Investigation Volume Over Time", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "linechart", "chartSettings": {"seriesLabelSettings": [{"seriesName": "NewInvestigations", "color": "blue"}]}}, "name": "investigationTrend"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudInvestigations_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend SeverityLabel = case(severity == 25, "Critical", severity == 20, "High", severity == 5, "Medium", severity == 2, "Low", "Other")
| summarize Count=count() by SeverityLabel)", "size": 3, "title": "Investigation Severity Breakdown", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "piechart", "chartSettings": {"seriesLabelSettings": [{"seriesName": "Critical", "color": "redBright"}, {"seriesName": "High", "color": "orange"}, {"seriesName": "Medium", "color": "yellow"}, {"seriesName": "Low", "color": "blue"}]}}, "name": "severityBreakdown"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudInvestigations_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by investigation_id
| extend SeverityLabel = case(severity == 25, "CRITICAL", severity == 20, "HIGH", severity == 5, "MEDIUM", "LOW")
| project InvestigationID=investigation_id, Subject=subject, Severity=SeverityLabel, Status=status, Created=TimeGenerated, ResultCount=result_count
| order by Severity asc, Created desc
| take 50)", "size": 0, "title": "Recent Investigations Detail", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "table", "gridSettings": {"sortBy": [{"itemKey": "Created", "sortOrder": 2}]}}, "name": "investigationDetail"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudInvestigations_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(status)
| summarize Count=count() by tostring(status))", "size": 3, "title": "Investigation Status Distribution", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "piechart", "chartSettings": {"seriesLabelSettings": [{"seriesName": "active", "color": "orange"}, {"seriesName": "completed", "color": "green"}, {"seriesName": "pending", "color": "yellow"}]}}, "name": "statusDistribution"}], "templateMetadata": {"version": "1.0", "connectorAssociation": [{"connectorId": "SpyCloudInvestigations", "dataTypes": ["SpyCloudInvestigations_CL"]}]}}
